mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, status, unlocked_at, passed_at, updated_at FROM listening_topic_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND topic_id = #{topicId}
SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, status, unlocked_at, passed_at, updated_at FROM listening_topic_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_topic_progress (user_id, topic_id, status, unlocked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, 'UNLOCKED', now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, topic_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO listening_topic_progress (user_id, topic_id, status, unlocked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, 'UNLOCKED', now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, topic_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'UNLOCKED', unlocked_at = now() WHERE listening_topic_progress.status = 'LOCKED'
mapper.update: UPDATE listening_topic_progress SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS', updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND topic_id = #{topicId}
UPDATE listening_topic_progress SET status = 'PASSED', passed_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND topic_id = #{topicId}
